pi_items.source: Verified via setup_task.sh which initializes this file and generates synthetic logs into it.
Verified via export_result.sh which explicitly searches for alert ID 100502 in alerts.json and local_rules.xml.
Verified via export_result.sh which statically checks local_rules.xml for the presence of rule ID 100501.
Verified via export_result.sh which explicitly checks for frequency='5' in local_rules.xml.
Verified via task instructions; although not statically checked in the export script, the task description explicitly requires a 60-second timeframe.
Verified via setup_task.sh which dynamically generates this script, and export_result.sh which executes it to simulate the attack.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on synthetically generated application logs. The log file path /var/log/megacorp.log, target rule ID 100502, base rule ID 100501, and the required frequency of 5 are all explicitly checked by the tasks export and verification scripts. The simulation script is generated and executed at /home/ga/generate_logs.sh. The 60 seconds timeframe requirement is explicitly defined in the task instructions.
